languages.text: "Нарушенная логика. Я воспользовался предоставившей возможностью, порожденной экстракцией звезды". {n}Мертвец издает шипение и кривится в жуткой пародии на недовольство.{/n} "Ты удовлетворен ответом, Субъект Восемьдесят Семь? Тогда приступай к исполнению программы. Мой репертуар стимуляции подопытного материала, не включающий в себя химическое воздействие, подходит к концу".

traits.locale_text: "Нарушенная логика. languages.text: "The logic is flawed. I took advantage of a convenient opportunity that arose from the extraction of the star." {n}The dead man hisses and crunches his face in a grotesque parody of displeasure.{/n} "Are you satisfied with the answer, Subject Eighty Seven? Then proceed with the program. I have nearly exhausted my repertoire of subject encouragement that does not involve chemical stimuli."

languages.text: "Die Logik ist fehlerhaft. Ich habe eine günstige Gelegenheit genutzt, die sich bei der Entnahme des Sterns ergab." {n}Der tote Mann zischt und verzieht sein Gesicht zu einer grotesken Parodie des Unmuts.{/n} "Bist du mit der Antwort zufrieden, Subjekt Siebenundachtzig? Dann fahren Sie mit dem Programm fort. Ich habe mein Repertoire an Versuchsanregungen, die keine chemischen Reize beinhalten, fast ausgeschöpft."
languages.original_text: "The logic is flawed. I took advantage of a convenient opportunity that arose from the extraction of the star." {n}The dead man hisses and crunches his face in a grotesque parody of displeasure.{/n} "Are you satisfied with the answer, Subject Eighty Seven? Then proceed with the program. I have nearly exhausted my repertoire of subject encouragement that does not involve chemical stimuli."

languages.text: "La logique est erronée. J'ai profité de l'occasion qui s'est présentée lors de l'extraction de l'étoile." {n}Le mort siffle et se croque le visage dans une grotesque parodie de mécontentement.{/n} "Êtes-vous satisfait de la réponse, sujet quatre-vingt-sept ? Alors continuez le programme. J'ai presque épuisé mon répertoire d'encouragement des sujets qui n'impliquent pas de stimuli chimiques."
languages.original_text: "The logic is flawed. I took advantage of a convenient opportunity that arose from the extraction of the star." {n}The dead man hisses and crunches his face in a grotesque parody of displeasure.{/n} "Are you satisfied with the answer, Subject Eighty Seven? Then proceed with the program. I have nearly exhausted my repertoire of subject encouragement that does not involve chemical stimuli."

languages.text: "逻辑有问题。我利用了提取恒星时出现的便利机会。"{n}死人嘶嘶作响，把脸捏得嘎嘎作响，一副不高兴的怪模怪样。{/n}"你对答案满意吗，八十七号实验体？那就继续进行吧。我几乎已经用尽了不涉及化学刺激的实验体鼓励方法。"
languages.original_text: "The logic is flawed. I took advantage of a convenient opportunity that arose from the extraction of the star." {n}The dead man hisses and crunches his face in a grotesque parody of displeasure.{/n} "Are you satisfied with the answer, Subject Eighty Seven? Then proceed with the program. I have nearly exhausted my repertoire of subject encouragement that does not involve chemical stimuli."

languages.text: "La lógica es errónea. Aproveché una oportunidad conveniente que surgió de la extracción de la estrella". {n}El muerto sisea y cruje la cara en una grotesca parodia de disgusto.{/n} "¿Está satisfecho con la respuesta, Sujeto Ochenta y Siete? Entonces prosiga con el programa. Casi he agotado mi repertorio de estímulos para sujetos que no impliquen estímulos químicos."
languages.original_text: "The logic is flawed. I took advantage of a convenient opportunity that arose from the extraction of the star." {n}The dead man hisses and crunches his face in a grotesque parody of displeasure.{/n} "Are you satisfied with the answer, Subject Eighty Seven? Then proceed with the program. I have nearly exhausted my repertoire of subject encouragement that does not involve chemical stimuli."

languages.text: "論理に欠陥がある。私は星の抽出から生じた好機を利用したのだ"{n}死んだ男は不愉快のグロテスクなパロディで顔をヒスつかせ、カクカクさせる。{/n}"被験者87、答えに満足したか？では、プログラムを進めてください。化学的刺激を伴わない被験者への励ましのレパートリーはほぼ使い果たした。"
languages.original_text: "The logic is flawed. I took advantage of a convenient opportunity that arose from the extraction of the star." {n}The dead man hisses and crunches his face in a grotesque parody of displeasure.{/n} "Are you satisfied with the answer, Subject Eighty Seven? Then proceed with the program. I have nearly exhausted my repertoire of subject encouragement that does not involve chemical stimuli."

languages.text: "Mantık hatalı. Yıldızın çıkarılmasıyla ortaya çıkan uygun bir fırsattan yararlandım." {n}Ölü adam tıslıyor ve yüzünü grotesk bir hoşnutsuzluk parodisiyle buruşturuyor.{/n} "Cevap sizi tatmin etti mi Denek Seksen Yedi? O halde programa devam edin. Kimyasal uyaran içermeyen denek teşvik repertuarımı neredeyse tükettim."
languages.original_text: "The logic is flawed. I took advantage of a convenient opportunity that arose from the extraction of the star." {n}The dead man hisses and crunches his face in a grotesque parody of displeasure.{/n} "Are you satisfied with the answer, Subject Eighty Seven? Then proceed with the program. I have nearly exhausted my repertoire of subject encouragement that does not involve chemical stimuli."
